title: Afeyan, Nagler & Tu (2025): Spatial RCC analysis: Gene expression visualizations
text:
Introduction
This is a book that contains all code to reproduce figures related to spatial analysis of TCR data associated with Afeyan, Nagler & Tu, et al (2025)
Note that while the code is identical, this book was rendered after final manuscript figures were generated and thus minor differences may arise, particularly for steps that are non-deterministic or rely on random number generators.
crumbs: Introduction

title: Afeyan, Nagler & Tu (2025): Spatial RCC analysis: Gene expression visualizations
section: Tertiary lymphoid structures are reservoirs of stem-like tumor-specific T cells in renal cell carcinoma
text:
Tertiary lymphoid structures are reservoirs of stem-like tumor-specific T cells in renal cell carcinoma
Alexander B. Afeyan†, Adi Nagler†, Chloe R. Tu†, Amit Sud, Nourhan El Ahmar, Gabriel Roberti De Oliveira, Berkay Simsek, Mehdi Borji, Haley E. Sax, Cleo Forman, Sophia Liu, Patrick A. Ott, Toni K. Choueiri, Jennifer G. Abelin, Shuqiang Li, Kenneth J. Livak, Jeremy M. Simon, Derin B. Keskin, Fei Chen, Sabina Signoretti, Giacomo Oliveira‡ˆ, David A. Braun‡ˆ, Catherine J. Wu‡ˆ

Abstract
Tertiary lymphoid structures (TLS) are associated with improved response to immune checkpoint blockade across solid tumors1–3, but their impact on tumor-specific T cell responses remains incompletely defined. By tracking the spatial phenotype of T cell clones with confirmed anti-tumor specificity, we report the architecture of T cell responses in renal cell carcinoma (RCC). Across 24 RCC tumors, TLS-containing (TLS+) tumors were more infiltrated by exhausted CD8 T cells, but with a reduced terminal exhaustion transcriptional program compared to TLS- tumors. To investigate the effect of TLS localization on RCC-specific T cells, we screened 581 CD8+ and CD4+ T cell receptor (TCR) α/β pairs across six patients and identified 72 tumor-specific (TS) and 21 tumor-antigen-specific TCRs. Among these bona fide TS-TCR clonotypes, 45.8% of clonotypes infiltrated tumors, and 10.2% localized within TLS by spatial transcriptomics. TS-TCRs in TLS+ tumors preferentially colocalized with plasma cell transcripts (P<0.0001) compared to viral-reactive TCRs, and were associated with upregulated progenitor exhausted. However, in counterbalance, exhausted TCR clonotypes also colocalized with macrophages of inferred immunosuppressive phenotype concentrated within a myeloid boundary of the tumor (P=3x10-14). Our data reveal TLS as reservoirs of tumor-specific T cells with stem-like features that could be leveraged by T cell immunotherapies.

title: 2  Gene expression in TS and VR specific TCRs
text:
9.1 Open scRNA derived phenotypes

scrna_phenotypes <- read.csv("../objects/reformatted_RCC_slideseq_parameters_052925.csv")

clones_of_int <- scrna_phenotypes %>%
  filter(tumor_specific == TRUE | virus_reactive == TRUE) %>%
  distinct(sctcr_clone) %>%
  pull(sctcr_clone)

phenotype_md <- scrna_phenotypes %>%
  filter(sctcr_clone %in% clones_of_int,
         (tumor_specific == TRUE | virus_reactive == TRUE)) %>%
  distinct(sctcr_clone, tumor_specific, virus_reactive) %>%
  mutate(specificity = case_when(tumor_specific == TRUE ~ "TS",
                                 virus_reactive == TRUE ~ "VR")) %>%
  select(sctcr_clone, specificity)
crumbs: 2  Gene expression in TS and VR specific TCRs

title: 2  Gene expression in TS and VR specific TCRs
text:
9.2 Get clones of interest

P102T_md <- rbind(P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data, P102TA_39_RNA@meta.data, P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data)

P107T_md <- rbind(P107TA_15_RNA@meta.data, P107TA_18_RNA@meta.data, 
                        P107TA_20_RNA@meta.data)

P108T_md <- rbind(P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data, P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data, 
                        P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data, P108TB_14_RNA@meta.data)

P102T_clones_counts <- count_clones_by_annotated_area(P102T_md, get_unique_productive_clones(clones_of_int)) %>%
  group_by(clone_id) %>%
  summarize(sum_count = sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(phenotype_md, by = c("clone_id" = "sctcr_clone"))

P107T_clones_counts <- count_clones_by_annotated_area(P107T_md, get_unique_productive_clones(clones_of_int)) %>%
  group_by(clone_id) %>%
  summarize(sum_count = sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(phenotype_md, by = c("clone_id" = "sctcr_clone"))

P108T_clones_counts <- count_clones_by_annotated_area(P108T_md, get_unique_productive_clones(clones_of_int)) %>%
  group_by(clone_id) %>%
  summarize(sum_count = sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(phenotype_md, by = c("clone_id" = "sctcr_clone"))

  arrange(sum_count)

title: 2  Gene expression in TS and VR specific TCRs
text:
11.1 Puck 10

11.1.1 Get beads near each each TS TCR at the near distance

# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_10_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  TS_near_list <- append(TS_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P102T_TS_clones, ";TS")



11.1.2 Get beads near each each TS TCR at the far distance

# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_10_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  TS_far_list <- append(TS_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P102T_TS_clones, ";TS")



11.1.3 Get beads near each each VR TCR at the near distance

# Get the beads near virus reactive clones
VR_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_10_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  VR_near_list <- append(VR_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P102T_VR_clones, ";VR")



11.1.4 Get beads near each each VR TCR at the far distance

# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
VR_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_10_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  VR_far_list <- append(VR_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P102T_VR_clones, ";VR")



11.1.5 Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the near distance

# Get the beads near non-TS or VR clones
other_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_10_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  other_near_list <- append(other_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_near_list <- collapse_list(other_near_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";p10;Other"))



11.1.6 Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the far distance

# Get the beads far from non-TS or VR clones
other_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_10_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  other_far_list <- append(other_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_far_list <- collapse_list(other_far_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";p10;Other"))



11.1.7 Merge TS distances, and VR distances

TS_list <- c(TS_near_list, TS_far_list)
VR_list <- c(VR_near_list, VR_far_list)
other_list <- c(other_near_list, other_far_list)


11.1.7.1 TS vs TS

ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
    for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
      if(i < j){

        }
      }
    }
}

11.4.7.1.1 Reassign overlapping beads

for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
    for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
      if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(TS_list[j])){
        same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
        
        if(same_beads > 0){
          # Reassign overlapping beads
          P102TA_39_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P102TA_39_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = TS_list[[j]])
          
          # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P102TA_39_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        TS_list[[j]] <- P102TA_39_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
        }
      }
    }
}

        new_row <- c(names(VR_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)

12.3.7 Attach assignments to original Seurat object and filter for defined beads

P107TA_20_RNA@meta.data <- P107TA_20_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(barcode %in% VR_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[2]),
         # Due to the way mutate is implemented, any previously beads assigned to be a TS or VR will not be given the "Other" label
                          barcode %in% other_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% other_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[2])),
         muscat = case_when(!is.na(type) ~ "Defined",
                             is.na(type) ~ "Undefined"),
         general_type = str_replace(type, "p10.*(?<=;)", ""),
         distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3))

P107TA_20_RNA <- subset(P107TA_20_RNA, subset = muscat == "Defined")

for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
    for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
      if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(TS_list[j])){
        same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
        
        if(same_beads > 0){
          # Reassign overlapping beads
          P108TA_26_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TA_26_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = TS_list[[j]])
          
          # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P108TA_26_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        TS_list[[j]] <- P108TA_26_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
        }
      }
    }
}

                          barcode %in% TS_list[[26]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[26]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[27]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[27]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[28]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[28]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[29]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[29]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[30]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[30]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[31]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[31]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[32]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[32]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[4]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[5]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[5]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[6]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[6]),
         # Due to the way mutate is implemented, any previously beads assigned to be a TS or VR will not be given the "Other" label
                          barcode %in% other_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% other_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[2])),
         muscat = case_when(!is.na(type) ~ "Defined",

         general_type = str_replace(type, "p10.*(?<=;)", ""),
         distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3))

text:
13.2 Puck 29

13.2.1 Get beads near each each TS TCR at the near distance

# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_29_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  TS_near_list <- append(TS_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")



13.2.2 Get beads near each each TS TCR at the far distance

# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_29_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  TS_far_list <- append(TS_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")



13.2.3 Get beads near each each VR TCR at the near distance

# Get the beads near virus reactive clones
VR_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_29_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  VR_near_list <- append(VR_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P108T_VR_clones, ";VR")



13.2.4 Get beads near each each VR TCR at the far distance

# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
VR_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_29_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  VR_far_list <- append(VR_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P108T_VR_clones, ";VR")



13.2.5 Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the near distance

# Get the beads near non-TS or VR clones
other_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_29_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  other_near_list <- append(other_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_near_list <- collapse_list(other_near_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";p10;Other"))



13.2.6 Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the far distance

# Get the beads far from non-TS or VR clones
other_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_29_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  other_far_list <- append(other_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_far_list <- collapse_list(other_far_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";p10;Other"))



13.2.7 Merge TS distances, and VR distances

TS_list <- c(TS_near_list, TS_far_list)
VR_list <- c(VR_near_list, VR_far_list)
other_list <- c(other_near_list, other_far_list)



13.2.8 Check for overlaps

13.2.8.1 TS vs TS

ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
    for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
      if(i < j){
        same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
        new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
        ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
      }
    }
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
    column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
    as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")

13.2.8.1.1 Reassign overlapping beads

for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
    for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
      if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(TS_list[j])){
        same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
        
        if(same_beads > 0){
          # Reassign overlapping beads
          P108TA_29_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TA_29_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = TS_list[[j]])
          
          # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P108TA_29_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        TS_list[[j]] <- P108TA_29_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
        }
      }
    }
}

13.3.1 Get beads near each each TS TCR at the near distance

# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_30_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  TS_near_list <- append(TS_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")



13.3.2 Get beads near each each TS TCR at the far distance

# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_30_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  TS_far_list <- append(TS_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")

# Get the beads near non-TS or VR clones
other_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_30_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  other_near_list <- append(other_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_near_list <- collapse_list(other_near_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";p10;Other"))

13.3.7 Check for overlaps

13.3.7.1 TS vs TS

ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
    for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
      if(i < j){
        same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
        new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
        ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
      }
    }
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
    column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
    as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")

13.3.7.1.1 Reassign overlapping beads

for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
    for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
      if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(TS_list[j])){
        same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
        
        if(same_beads > 0){
          # Reassign overlapping beads
          P108TA_30_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TA_30_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = TS_list[[j]])
          
          # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P108TA_30_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        TS_list[[j]] <- P108TA_30_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
        }
      }
    }
}

14.1.8.1.1 Reassign overlapping beads

for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
    for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
      if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(TS_list[j])){
        same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
        
        if(same_beads > 0){
          # Reassign overlapping beads
          P108TB_06_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TB_06_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = TS_list[[j]])
          
          # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P108TB_06_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        TS_list[[j]] <- P108TB_06_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
        }
      }
    }
}

  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TB_14_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  other_far_list <- append(other_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_far_list <- collapse_list(other_far_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";p10;Other"))



14.2.7 Merge TS distances, and VR distances

TS_list <- c(TS_near_list, TS_far_list)
VR_list <- c(VR_near_list, VR_far_list)
other_list <- c(other_near_list, other_far_list)



14.2.8 Check for overlaps

14.2.8.1 TS vs TS

ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
    for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
      if(i < j){
        same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
        new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
        ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
      }
    }
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat

    pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
    column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
    as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,

for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
    for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
      if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(TS_list[j])){
        same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
        
        if(same_beads > 0){
          # Reassign overlapping beads
          P108TB_14_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TB_14_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = TS_list[[j]])
          
          # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P108TB_14_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        TS_list[[j]] <- P108TB_14_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
        }
      }
    }
}

14.6.1 Calculate the median plasma score of each neoantigen

pucks@meta.data <- pucks@meta.data %>%
  mutate(distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         distance = case_when(is.na(distance) ~ "Other",
                              T ~ distance),
         final_clone_id = str_split_i(type, ";", 2),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3),
         specificity = case_when(is.na(specificity) ~ "Other",
                                 T ~ specificity),
         Patient = str_sub(orig.ident, start = 1, end = 5),
         Patient_specificity = paste0(Patient, "_", specificity))
  
median.df <- pucks@meta.data %>%
  group_by(final_clone_id, distance, specificity, Patient) %>%
  summarize(median_b = round(median(nieto.b1), 4),
            median_plasma = round(median(nieto.plasma1), 4),
            count = n()) %>%
  filter(Patient != "P107T",
         specificity != "Other")

`summarise()` has grouped output by 'final_clone_id', 'distance',
'specificity'. You can override using the `.groups` argument.

section: 15.1 Format near and far data into a heatmap
text:
15.1 Format near and far data into a heatmap

pucks@meta.data <- pucks@meta.data %>%
  mutate(distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         distance = case_when(is.na(distance) ~ "Other",
                              T ~ distance),
         final_clone_id = str_split_i(type, ";", 2),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3),
         specificity = case_when(is.na(specificity) ~ "Other",
                                 T ~ specificity),
         Patient = str_sub(orig.ident, start = 1, end = 5),
         Patient_specificity = paste0(Patient, "_", specificity))

## plasma and b
plasma_b_genes <- c(gene_sets$nieto_b, gene_sets$nieto_b_plasma)

# Remove VPREB3 and IGKV1-12
plasma_b_genes <- plasma_b_genes[!(plasma_b_genes %in% c("VPREB3", "IGKV1-12"))]

pb_counts.df <- FetchData(object = pucks, vars = plasma_b_genes, layer = "counts") %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "merged_bc")

Warning: The following requested variables were not found: MARCH1, HIST1H1C,
FAM46C, SELM, VIMP, IGHGP

pb_pucks.md <- pucks@meta.data[,c("Patient", "distance", "specificity", "final_clone_id")] %>%
  mutate(merged_bc = rownames(.)) %>%
  full_join(pb_counts.df, by = "merged_bc") %>%
  filter(specificity %in% c("TS", "VR"))

pb_mean.df <- pb_pucks.md %>%
  group_by(Patient, distance, specificity, final_clone_id) %>%
  summarize(num = n(),
            across(where(is.numeric), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(Patient %in% c("P102T", "P108T"))

# Add phenotypes to mean df
unique_scrna_phenotypes <- scrna_phenotypes %>%
  distinct(sctcr_clone, PrimaryCluster)

pb_mean.df <- unique_scrna_phenotypes %>%
  right_join(pb_mean.df, by = c("sctcr_clone" = "final_clone_id"))

pb_mean.mat <- pb_mean.df[,-c(1:6)] %>%
  t()

pb_mean.md <- pb_mean.df[,c(1:6)] %>%
  mutate(Patient_specificity_distance = paste0(Patient, "_", specificity, "_", distance),
         Patient_specificity_distance = factor(Patient_specificity_distance, levels = c("P108T_TS_r0-30", "P108T_TS_r100-145", "P108T_VR_r0-30", "P108T_VR_r100-145", "P102T_TS_r0-30", "P102T_TS_r100-145", "P102T_VR_r0-30", "P102T_VR_r100-145")))


15.1.0.1 Build row annotation

pb_gene.md <- do.call(list, list(gene_sets$nieto_b, gene_sets$nieto_b_plasma))

names(pb_gene.md) <- c("B cell", "Plasma cell")

pb_gene.md <- pb_gene.md %>%
  enframe(name = "cell_type", value = "gene") %>% 
  unnest(gene)

pb_gene.md <- pb_gene.md[c(pb_gene.md$gene %in% rownames(pb_mean.mat)),]

pb_gene.md <- pb_gene.md %>%
  # Remove duplicated genes
  filter(!(cell_type == "Plasma cell" & gene %in% c("POU2AF1", "CD79A")))

row_annot <- rowAnnotation(Cell_type = pb_gene.md$cell_type)



15.1.1 Plot heatmap

col_annot <- HeatmapAnnotation(Patient = pb_mean.md$Patient,
                           Distance = pb_mean.md$distance,
                           Specificity = pb_mean.md$specificity,
                           Area = pb_mean.md$area_final,
                           Phenotype = pb_mean.md$PrimaryCluster,
                          `TS Score` = pb_mean.md$ts21,
                           col = list(Patient = c("P102T" = "#FF9300", "P107T" = "#FF8AD8", "P108T" = "#009193"),
                                      Distance = c("r0-30" = "grey40", "r100-145" = "grey80", "Other" = "grey90"),
                                      Specificity = c("VR" = "navyblue", "TS" = "red", "Other" = "grey"),
                                      Area = c("Boundary" = "#ff8f1b", "TLS" = "#8A9A5B", "Tumor" = "#974000"),
                                      Phenotype = c("Tmem" = "#0330F3", "Tex" = "#931101", "Treg" = "#ff4ff0")
                                      ),
                           simple_anno_size = unit(0.7, "cm"),
                           annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
                           border = TRUE)


c_col = colorRamp2(c(0, 1.5), c("grey90", "red"))

hm <- Heatmap(pb_mean.mat,
        top_annotation = col_annot,
        # Rows
        row_split = pb_gene.md$cell_type,
        row_title_rot = 0,
        show_row_dend = FALSE,
        cluster_row_slices = FALSE,
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11),
        row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
        # Columns
        column_split = pb_mean.md$Patient_specificity_distance,
        cluster_column_slices = FALSE,
        column_title = " ",
        show_column_dend = FALSE,
        column_labels = pb_mean.md$num,
        column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11),
        column_names_side = "bottom",
        column_names_rot = -90,
        # Misc
        col = c_col,
        border_gp = gpar(col = "black"),
        name = "Mean\nexpr.")

hm










15.1.2 Plot boxplot

median.df <- pucks@meta.data %>%
  group_by(final_clone_id, distance, specificity, Patient) %>%
  summarize(median_b = round(median(nieto.b1), 4),
            median_plasma = round(median(nieto.plasma1), 4),
            count = n()) %>%
  filter(Patient != "P107T",
         specificity != "Other")

`summarise()` has grouped output by 'final_clone_id', 'distance',
'specificity'. You can override using the `.groups` argument.

ggplot(median.df, aes(x = distance, y = median_plasma)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = distance)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Patient, group = final_clone_id)) +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(Patient~specificity, scale = "free") +

  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey40", "grey90")) +
  ylab("Median Plasma Score") +
  xlab("Distance") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.052, -0.021))







ggplot(median.df, aes(x = distance, y = median_b)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = distance)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Patient, group = final_clone_id)) +

title: 2  Gene expression in TS and VR specific TCRs
section: 16.1 Format near and far data into a heatmap for supplement
text:
16.1 Format near and far data into a heatmap for supplement

genes_of_int <- c("PDCD1", "CTLA4", "TIGIT", "LAG3", "HAVCR2", "TOX", "CCR7", "TCF7", "SELL", "IL7R", "CD28", "PRF1", "GZMH", "GZMK", "GZMB", "GZMA", "GNLY", "MKI67", "STMN1", "BCL6", "CXCL13", "CXCR5", "FOXP3")

counts.df <- FetchData(object = pucks, vars = genes_of_int, layer = "counts") %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "merged_bc")

pucks.md <- pucks@meta.data[,c("Patient", "distance", "specificity", "final_clone_id", "ts3", "vr4", "exhaustion1", "memory2")] %>%
  mutate(merged_bc = rownames(.)) %>%
  full_join(counts.df, by = "merged_bc") %>%
  filter(specificity %in% c("TS", "VR"))

mean.df <- pucks.md %>%
  group_by(Patient, distance, specificity, final_clone_id) %>%
  summarize(num = n(),
            across(where(is.numeric), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(Patient %in% c("P102T", "P108T"),
         distance != "r100-145")

# Add phenotypes to mean df
unique_scrna_phenotypes <- scrna_phenotypes %>%
  distinct(sctcr_clone, PrimaryCluster)

mean.df <- unique_scrna_phenotypes %>%
  right_join(mean.df, by = c("sctcr_clone" = "final_clone_id"))

mean.mat <- mean.df[,-c(1:10)] %>%
  t()

scaled_mean.mat <- t(scale(t(mean.mat)))

mean.md <- mean.df[,c(1:10)] %>%
  mutate(Patient_specificity = paste0(Patient, "_", specificity),
         Patient_specificity = factor(Patient_specificity, levels = c("P108T_TS", "P108T_VR", "P108T_Other", "P102T_TS", "P102T_VR", "P102T_Other")))


16.1.0.1 Build row annotation

exhaustion <- c("PDCD1", "CTLA4", "TIGIT", "LAG3", "HAVCR2", "TOX")
memory <- c("CCR7", "TCF7", "SELL", "IL7R", "CD28")
cytotoxicity <- c("PRF1", "GZMH", "GZMK", "GZMB", "GZMA", "GNLY")
proliferation <- c("MKI67", "STMN1") 
tfh <- c("BCL6", "CXCL13", "CXCR5")
treg <- c("FOXP3")

gene.md <- do.call(list, list(exhaustion, memory, cytotoxicity, proliferation, tfh, treg))

names(gene.md) <- c("Exhaustion", "Memory", "Cytotoxicity", "Proliferation", "Tfh", "Treg")

gene.md <- gene.md %>%
  enframe(name = "cell_type", value = "gene") %>% 
  unnest(gene) %>%
  mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = c("Memory", "Exhaustion", "Cytotoxicity", "Proliferation", "Tfh", "Treg")))

row_annot <- rowAnnotation(Cell_type = gene.md$cell_type)



16.1.1 Plot supplementary heatmapheatmap

col_annot <- HeatmapAnnotation(Patient = mean.md$Patient,
                           # Distance = mean.md$distance,
                           Specificity = mean.md$specificity,
                           Area = mean.md$area_final,
                           Phenotype = mean.md$PrimaryCluster,
                           col = list(Patient = c("P102T" = "#FF9300", "P107T" = "#FF8AD8", "P108T" = "#009193"),
                                      # Distance = c("r0-30" = "grey40", "r100-145" = "grey80", "Other" = "grey90"),
                                      Specificity = c("VR" = "navyblue", "TS" = "red", "Other" = "grey"),
                                      Area = c("Boundary" = "#ff8f1b", "TLS" = "#8A9A5B", "Tumor" = "#974000"),
                                      Phenotype = c("Tmem" = "#0330F3", "Tex" = "#931101", "Treg" = "#ff4ff0")),
                           simple_anno_size = unit(0.7, "cm"),
                           annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
                           border = TRUE)


c_col = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.1), c("grey90", "red"))

hm_sup <- Heatmap(mean.mat,
        top_annotation = col_annot,
        # Rows
        row_split = gene.md$cell_type,
        row_title_rot = 0,
        show_row_dend = FALSE,
        cluster_row_slices = FALSE,
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 12),
        row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
        # Columns
        column_split = mean.md$Patient_specificity,
        cluster_column_slices = FALSE,
        column_title = " ",
        show_column_dend = FALSE,
        column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11),
        column_names_side = "bottom",
        column_names_rot = -90,
        # Misc
        col = c_col,
        border_gp = gpar(col = "black"),
        name = "Mean\nexpr.")

draw(hm_sup, padding = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 10), "mm"))

7.1 Add a generalized column “tls_status”

add_TLS_column <- function(obj){
  obj <- obj %>%
    mutate(tls_status = case_when(area %in% c("TLS1", "TLS2", "TLS3", "TLS4", "M2") ~ "inTLS",
                              area %in% c("Boundary", "Tumor") ~ "outTLS"))
  
  return(obj)
}

P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data %>%
  add_TLS_column() %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(area == "M2" ~ "TLS2",
                          T ~ area))
P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data %>%
  add_TLS_column()

P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  add_TLS_column()
P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data %>%
  add_TLS_column()
P108TA_30_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_30_RNA@meta.data %>%
  add_TLS_column()
P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data %>%
  add_TLS_column()

text:
11.1 P102TA

P102TA_md <- rbind(P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data, P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data)

P102TA_tls_md <- P102TA_md %>%
  filter(tls_status == "inTLS")

P102TA_nontls_md <- P102TA_md %>%
  filter(tls_status == "outTLS")

P102TA_tls_clones_counts <- count_clones_by_annotated_area(P102TA_tls_md, get_unique_productive_clones(P102TA_tls_md$clone_id)) %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(area %in% c("TLS1", "TLS2", "TLS3", "M2") ~ "TLS",
                          T ~ "wrong")) %>%
  group_by(clone_id, area) %>%
  summarize(sum_count = sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()

`summarise()` has grouped output by 'clone_id'. You can override using the
`.groups` argument.

P102TA_nontls_clones_counts <- count_clones_by_annotated_area(P102TA_nontls_md, get_unique_productive_clones(P102TA_nontls_md$clone_id)) %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(area %in% c("Tumor", "Boundary") ~ "nonTLS",
                          T ~ "wrong")) %>%
  group_by(clone_id, area) %>%
  summarize(sum_count = sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()

`summarise()` has grouped output by 'clone_id'. You can override using the
`.groups` argument.

# We want clones seen in 5 beads or more in each region
P102TA_tls_clones <- P102TA_tls_clones_counts %>%
  filter(sum_count >= 5) %>%
  pull(clone_id)
P102TA_nontls_clones <- P102TA_nontls_clones_counts %>%
  filter(sum_count >= 5) %>%
  pull(clone_id)

section: 23.1 Dotplot split by Patient and area
text:
23.1 Dotplot split by Patient and area

TLS_nonzero <- TLS_md_long %>%
  filter(counts > 0) %>%
  group_by(Patient, tls_status_gid, gene, area) %>%
  summarize(n_cells_nonzero = n())

`summarise()` has grouped output by 'Patient', 'tls_status_gid', 'gene'. You
can override using the `.groups` argument.

TLS_md_sum <- TLS_md_long %>%
  group_by(Patient, tls_status_gid, gene, area) %>%
  summarize(mean_counts = mean(counts),
            n_cells = n()) %>%
  full_join(TLS_nonzero, by = c("Patient", "tls_status_gid", "gene", "area")) %>%
  mutate(n_cells_nonzero = replace_na(n_cells_nonzero, 0),
         pct_cells_exp = n_cells_nonzero/n_cells)

`summarise()` has grouped output by 'Patient', 'tls_status_gid', 'gene'. You
can override using the `.groups` argument.

TLS_md_sum %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = gene, y = area, fill = mean_counts, size = pct_cells_exp))+
  geom_point(shape = 21, color = "black") +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(Patient~tls_status_gid, scales = "free_y") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "white", mid = "red", high = "red", midpoint = 0.4)

8.1 Add a generalized column “tls_status”

add_TLS_column <- function(obj){
  obj <- obj %>%
    mutate(tls_status = case_when(area %in% c("TLS1", "TLS2", "TLS3", "TLS4", "M2") ~ "inTLS",
                              area %in% c("Boundary", "Tumor") ~ "outTLS"))
  
  return(obj)
}

P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  add_TLS_column()
P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data %>%
  add_TLS_column()
P108TA_30_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_30_RNA@meta.data %>%
  add_TLS_column()
P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data %>%
  add_TLS_column()

scrna_phenotypes <- read.csv("../objects/reformatted_RCC_slideseq_parameters_052925.csv")

title: 4  Gene expression in shared neoantigen-specific TCRs
text:
11.1 P108TA

P108TA_md <- rbind(P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data, P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data, P108TA_30_RNA@meta.data, P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data)

P108TA_tls_md <- P108TA_md %>%
  filter(tls_status == "inTLS")

P108TA_nontls_md <- P108TA_md %>%
  filter(tls_status == "outTLS")

P108TA_tls_clones_counts <- count_clones_by_annotated_area(P108TA_tls_md, get_unique_productive_clones(P108TA_tls_md$clone_id)) %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(area %in% c("TLS1", "TLS2", "TLS3", "M2") ~ "TLS",
                          T ~ "wrong")) %>%
  group_by(clone_id, area) %>%
  summarize(sum_count = sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()

`summarise()` has grouped output by 'clone_id'. You can override using the
`.groups` argument.

P108TA_nontls_clones_counts <- count_clones_by_annotated_area(P108TA_nontls_md, get_unique_productive_clones(P108TA_nontls_md$clone_id)) %>%
  mutate(area = case_when(area %in% c("Tumor", "Boundary") ~ "nonTLS",
                          T ~ "wrong")) %>%
  group_by(clone_id, area) %>%
  summarize(sum_count = sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()

`summarise()` has grouped output by 'clone_id'. You can override using the
`.groups` argument.

# We want neoantigen clones seen in 3 beads or more in each region
P108TA_tls_clones <- P108TA_tls_clones_counts %>%
  filter(sum_count >= 3,
         clone_id %in% neoantigen_clones) %>%
  pull(clone_id)
P108TA_nontls_clones <- P108TA_nontls_clones_counts %>%
  filter(sum_count >= 3,
         clone_id %in% neoantigen_clones) %>%
  pull(clone_id)

table(P108TA_tls_clones %in% P108TA_nontls_clones)


TRUE 
   5 

table(P108TA_nontls_clones %in% P108TA_tls_clones)


FALSE  TRUE 
    2     5 

P108TA_shared_clones <- P108TA_tls_clones[P108TA_tls_clones %in% P108TA_nontls_clones]

title: 4  Gene expression in shared neoantigen-specific TCRs
text:
14.1 Puck 26

14.1.1 Get beads near each shared neoantigen clone inside the TLS

# Get the beads near shared neoantigen clones
inTLS_list <- list()

for(clone in P108TA_shared_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_neoantigen_TCR2(P108TA_26_RNA, "inTLS", clone, rad)
  inTLS_list <- append(inTLS_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(inTLS_list) <- P108TA_shared_clones



14.1.2 Get beads near each shared neoantigen clone outside the TLS

# Get the beads near shared neoantigen clones
outTLS_list <- list()

for(clone in P108TA_shared_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_neoantigen_TCR2(P108TA_26_RNA, "outTLS", clone, rad)
  outTLS_list <- append(outTLS_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(outTLS_list) <- P108TA_shared_clones



14.1.3 Check for overlaps

14.1.3.1 in TLS vs in TLS

in_vs_in.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(P108TA_shared_clones)) {
    for(j in 1:length(P108TA_shared_clones)) {
      if(i < j){
        same_beads <- length(intersect(inTLS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, inTLS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
        new_row <- c(names(inTLS_list)[i], names(inTLS_list)[j], same_beads)
        in_vs_in.df <- rbind(in_vs_in.df, new_row)
      }
    }
}

colnames(in_vs_in.df) <- c("neoantigen1", "neoantigen2", "beads")

# Reformat
in_vs_in.df <- in_vs_in.df %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from=neoantigen2,values_from=beads) %>%
    column_to_rownames("neoantigen1") %>%
    as.matrix()

Heatmap(in_vs_in.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby beads in TLS vs in TLS",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")










14.1.3.2 Outside TLS vs outside TLS

out_vs_out.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(P108TA_shared_clones)) {
    for(j in 1:length(P108TA_shared_clones)) {
      if(i < j){
        same_beads <- length(intersect(outTLS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, outTLS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
        new_row <- c(names(outTLS_list)[i], names(outTLS_list)[j], same_beads)
        out_vs_out.df <- rbind(out_vs_out.df, new_row)
      }
    }
}

colnames(out_vs_out.df) <- c("neoantigen1", "neoantigen2", "beads")

# Reformat
out_vs_out.df <- out_vs_out.df %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from=neoantigen2,values_from=beads) %>%
    column_to_rownames("neoantigen1") %>%
    as.matrix()

Heatmap(out_vs_out.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby beads outside TLS vs outside TLS",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")









14.1.3.2.1 View overlap of beads in p108_1 and p108_205

overlapped_beads <- intersect(outTLS_list$p108_1$near_beads$barcode, outTLS_list$p108_205$near_beads$barcode)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outTLS_list$p108_1$near_beads, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_point(data = outTLS_list$p108_1$TCRs, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "blue") +
  geom_point(data = filter(P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data, barcode %in% overlapped_beads), aes(x = x, y = y), color = "red") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 5000), ylim = c(0, 5000))







ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outTLS_list$p108_205$near_beads, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_point(data = outTLS_list$p108_205$TCRs, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "blue")+
  geom_point(data = filter(P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data, barcode %in% overlapped_beads), aes(x = x, y = y), color = "red") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 5000), ylim = c(0, 5000))










14.1.3.2.2 Reassign overlapping beads

# P108_1 and P108_205
# Reassign overlapping beads
P108TA_26_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TA_26_RNA, tex_beads = outTLS_list$p108_205, tmem_beads = outTLS_list$p108_1)

# Split list back out
outTLS_list$p108_205 <- P108TA_26_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
outTLS_list$p108_1 <- P108TA_26_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads

# Plot updated beads
ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outTLS_list$p108_1$near_beads, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_point(data = outTLS_list$p108_1$TCRs, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "blue") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 5000), ylim = c(0, 5000))







ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outTLS_list$p108_205$near_beads, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_point(data = outTLS_list$p108_205$TCRs, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "blue")+
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 5000), ylim = c(0, 5000))







# P108_208 and P108_205
# Reassign overlapping beads
P108TA_26_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TA_26_RNA, tex_beads = outTLS_list$p108_205, tmem_beads = outTLS_list$p108_208)

# Split list back out
outTLS_list$p108_205 <- P108TA_26_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
outTLS_list$p108_208 <- P108TA_26_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads

# P108_215 and P108_205
# Reassign overlapping beads
P108TA_26_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TA_26_RNA, tex_beads = outTLS_list$p108_205, tmem_beads = outTLS_list$p108_215)

# Split list back out
outTLS_list$p108_205 <- P108TA_26_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
outTLS_list$p108_215 <- P108TA_26_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads

        name = "No. of\nbeads")











14.4.4 Attach assignments to original Seurat object and filter for defined beads

# Attach partition data
partition.df <- data.frame()
for(i in c(1:(length(inTLS_list)))){
  if(nrow(inTLS_list[[i]]$near_beads) > 0){
    near <- inTLS_list[[i]]$near_beads %>%
      select(barcode, partition)
    partition.df <- rbind(partition.df, near)
  }
}
for(i in c(1:(length(outTLS_list)))){
  if(nrow(outTLS_list[[i]]$near_beads) > 0){
    near <- outTLS_list[[i]]$near_beads %>%
      select(barcode, partition)
    partition.df <- rbind(partition.df, near)
  }
}

P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data %>%
  left_join(partition.df, by = "barcode") %>%
  column_to_rownames("barcode") %>%
  mutate(barcode = rownames(.))


P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(barcode %in% inTLS_list$p108_1$near_beads$barcode ~ "p108_1,inTLS",
                          barcode %in% inTLS_list$p108_205$near_beads$barcode ~ "p108_205,inTLS",
                          barcode %in% inTLS_list$p108_208$near_beads$barcode ~ "p108_208,inTLS",
                          barcode %in% inTLS_list$p108_215$near_beads$barcode ~ "p108_215,inTLS",
                          barcode %in% inTLS_list$p108_266$near_beads$barcode ~ "p108_266,inTLS",
                          barcode %in% outTLS_list$p108_1$near_beads$barcode ~ "p108_1,outTLS",
                          barcode %in% outTLS_list$p108_205$near_beads$barcode ~ "p108_205,outTLS",
                          barcode %in% outTLS_list$p108_208$near_beads$barcode ~ "p108_208,outTLS",
                          barcode %in% outTLS_list$p108_215$near_beads$barcode ~ "p108_215,outTLS",
                          barcode %in% outTLS_list$p108_266$near_beads$barcode ~ "p108_266,outTLS"),
         muscat = case_when(!is.na(type) ~ "Defined",
                             is.na(type) ~ "Undefined"))

P108TA_32_RNA <- subset(P108TA_32_RNA, subset = muscat == "Defined")

section: 16.3 Get beads within 15px of a neoantigen specific TCR to share the same “area” annotation
text:
16.3 Get beads within 15px of a neoantigen specific TCR to share the same “area” annotation

16.3.1 Puck 26

P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::count(area, tls_status_gid)

      area tls_status_gid   n
1 Boundary          inTLS   3
2 Boundary         outTLS 351
3     TLS2          inTLS  14
4     TLS3          inTLS  39
5    Tumor         outTLS 344

boundary_inTLS <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(area == "Boundary", str_detect(type, "inTLS"))

# Get beads near the boundary beads
near_beads <- nn2(P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data[,c("x", "y")], boundary_inTLS[,c("x", "y")], radius = 15, k = 10, searchtype = "radius")
# Collapse matrix of row indexes into a vector of unique values
near_beads <- unique(as.vector(near_beads$nn.idx))
# Collect metadata of nearby beads
near_beads_md <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data[near_beads,]
# Which areas are those beads from?
near_beads_md %>%
  dplyr::count(area)

      area n
1 Boundary 3
2     TLS3 5

# Cast beads to TLS3
P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(final_area = case_when(area == "Boundary" & str_detect(type, "inTLS") ~ "TLS3",
                              T ~ area))

section: 21.1 Dotplot split by area and tls status
text:
21.1 Dotplot split by area and tls status

TLS_nonzero <- TLS_md_long %>%
  filter(counts > 0) %>%
  group_by(tls_status_gid, gene, final_area) %>%
  summarize(n_cells_nonzero = n())

`summarise()` has grouped output by 'tls_status_gid', 'gene'. You can override
using the `.groups` argument.

TLS_md_sum <- TLS_md_long %>%
  group_by(tls_status_gid, gene, final_area) %>%
  summarize(mean_counts = mean(counts),
            n_cells = n()) %>%
  full_join(TLS_nonzero, by = c("tls_status_gid", "gene", "final_area")) %>%
  mutate(n_cells_nonzero = replace_na(n_cells_nonzero, 0),
         pct_cells_exp = n_cells_nonzero/n_cells)

`summarise()` has grouped output by 'tls_status_gid', 'gene'. You can override
using the `.groups` argument.

TLS_md_sum %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = gene, y = final_area, fill = mean_counts, size = pct_cells_exp))+
  geom_point(shape = 21, color = "black") +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~tls_status_gid, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.box = "horizontal", 
        legend.position = "right") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "white", mid = "red", high = "red", midpoint = 0.6) +
  ylab("TLS")

13.1.2 Calculate the mean macrophage score of each area

mean_per_patient.df <- pucks@meta.data %>%
  group_by(Patient, final_area) %>%
  summarize(mean_plasma = round(mean(nieto_b_plasma1), 8),
            mean_b = round(mean(nieto_b2), 8),
            mean_myeloid_prolif = round(mean(nieto_myeloid_prolif3), 8),
            mean_projectils_cd4_naive = round(mean(projecTILs.CD4.NaiveLike4), 8),
            mean_projectils_treg = round(mean(projecTILs.CD4.Treg5), 8),
            mean_projectils_tfh = round(mean(projecTILs.CD4.Tfh6), 8),
            mean_ag_pres = round(mean(Guimaraes.Mac_AgPres7), 8),
            mean_mac_ifn = round(mean(Guimaraes.Mac_IFN8), 8),
            mean_m1 = round(mean(guimaraes.m110), 8),
            mean_rtm_la = round(mean(Guimaraes.RTM_LA9), 8),
            mean_rcc_kegg = round(mean(KEGG_RENAL_CELL_CARCINOMA11), 8),
            mean_biocarta_hypoxia = round(mean(BIOCARTA_VEGF_PATHWAY12), 8),
            mean_buffa_hypoxia = round(mean(BUFFA_HYPOXIA_METAGENE13), 8),
            mean_rcc_wp = round(mean(WP_CLEAR_CELL_RENAL_CELL_CARCINOMA_PATHWAYS14), 8),
            mean_cabrita_tls_hm = round(mean(Signature.Cabrita_TLS_Hallmark15), 8),
            mean_cabrita_tls_sig = round(mean(Signature.Cabrita_TLS_Signature16), 8),
            mean_meylan_tls = round(mean(Signature.Meylan_TLS17), 8),
            mean_xu_tls = round(mean(Signature.Xu_TLS18), 8)) %>%
  mutate(tls_status = case_when(Patient %in% c("P102T", "P107T", "P108T") ~ "TLS+",
                                Patient %in% c("P109T", "P110T", "P111T") ~ "TLS-")) %>%
  ungroup()

`summarise()` has grouped output by 'Patient'. You can override using the
`.groups` argument.

mean.df <- pucks@meta.data %>%

`summarise()` has grouped output by 'Patient', 'final_area'. You can override
using the `.groups` argument.

sd.df <- pucks@meta.data %>%
  group_by(Patient, final_area, orig.ident) %>%
  summarize(n = n(),
            sd_plasma = round(sd(nieto_b_plasma1), 8),
            sd_b = round(sd(nieto_b2), 8),
            sd_myeloid_prolif = round(sd(nieto_myeloid_prolif3), 8),
            sd_projectils_cd4_naive = round(sd(projecTILs.CD4.NaiveLike4), 8),
            sd_projectils_treg = round(sd(projecTILs.CD4.Treg5), 8),
            sd_projectils_tfh = round(sd(projecTILs.CD4.Tfh6), 8),
            sd_ag_pres = round(sd(Guimaraes.Mac_AgPres7), 8),
            sd_mac_ifn = round(sd(Guimaraes.Mac_IFN8), 8),
            sd_m1 = round(sd(guimaraes.m110), 8),
            sd_rtm_la = round(sd(Guimaraes.RTM_LA9), 8),
            sd_rcc_kegg = round(sd(KEGG_RENAL_CELL_CARCINOMA11), 8),
            sd_biocarta_hypoxia = round(sd(BIOCARTA_VEGF_PATHWAY12), 8),
            sd_buffa_hypoxia = round(sd(BUFFA_HYPOXIA_METAGENE13), 8),
            sd_rcc_wp = round(sd(WP_CLEAR_CELL_RENAL_CELL_CARCINOMA_PATHWAYS14), 8),
            sd_cabrita_tls_hm = round(sd(Signature.Cabrita_TLS_Hallmark15), 8),
            sd_cabrita_tls_sig = round(sd(Signature.Cabrita_TLS_Signature16), 8),
            sd_meylan_tls = round(sd(Signature.Meylan_TLS17), 8),
            sd_xu_tls = round(sd(Signature.Xu_TLS18), 8)) %>%
  mutate(tls_status = case_when(Patient %in% c("P102T", "P107T", "P108T") ~ "TLS+",
                                Patient %in% c("P109T", "P110T", "P111T") ~ "TLS-"),
         se_plasma = round(sd_plasma/sqrt(n), 8),
            se_b = round(sd_b/sqrt(n), 8),
            se_myeloid_prolif = round((sd_myeloid_prolif/sqrt(n)), 8),
            se_projectils_cd4_naive = round(sd_projectils_cd4_naive/sqrt(n), 8),
            se_projectils_treg = round(sd_projectils_treg/sqrt(n), 8),
            se_projectils_tfh = round(sd_projectils_tfh/sqrt(n), 8),
            se_ag_pres = round(sd_ag_pres/sqrt(n), 8),
            se_mac_ifn = round(sd_mac_ifn/sqrt(n), 8),
            se_m1 = round(sd_m1/sqrt(n), 8),
            se_rtm_la = round(sd_rtm_la/sqrt(n), 8),
            se_rcc_kegg = round(sd_rcc_kegg/sqrt(n), 8),
            se_biocarta_hypoxia = round(sd_biocarta_hypoxia/sqrt(n), 8),
            se_buffa_hypoxia = round(sd_buffa_hypoxia/sqrt(n), 8),
            se_rcc_wp = round(sd_rcc_wp/sqrt(n), 8),
         se_cabrita_tls_hm = round(sd_cabrita_tls_hm/sqrt(n), 8),
         se_cabrita_tls_sig = round(sd_cabrita_tls_sig/sqrt(n), 8),
         se_meylan_tls = round(sd_meylan_tls/sqrt(n), 8),
         se_xu_tls = round(sd_xu_tls/sqrt(n), 8)) %>%
  ungroup()

title: 6  Variable and constant TCR gene plots
section: 12.1 Plot after filtering each UMI bin for 3 beads or more
text:
12.1 Plot after filtering each UMI bin for 3 beads or more

pct_tra_sum <- pct_tra %>%
  filter(n_tra_with_tcr_beads > 3,
         n_umi != 0) %>%
  group_by(n_umi) %>%
  summarize(sum_n_tra_beads = sum(n_tra_beads),
            sum_n_tra_beads_with_tcr = sum(n_tra_with_tcr_beads),
            mean_pct_tra_with_tcr = mean(pct_tra_with_tcr),
            std = sd(pct_tra_with_tcr),
            serror = std.error(pct_tra_with_tcr))


tra_plot <- ggplot(pct_tra_sum, aes(x = as.character(n_umi), y = mean_pct_tra_with_tcr)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#B0CBE7FF") +
  geom_text(data = pct_tra_sum, 
              aes(x = as.character(n_umi), 
                  y = 80,
                  angle = 90,
                  label = sum_n_tra_beads),
              colour="black", 
              size=3.5) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_pct_tra_with_tcr-serror, ymax=mean_pct_tra_with_tcr+serror), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +
  theme_classic()  +
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_blank()) +
  xlab("Number of constant TCR UMIs on a bead") +
  ylab("Percentage of beads with variable TCRs")
crumbs: 6  Variable and constant TCR gene plots

title: 6  Variable and constant TCR gene plots
section: 13.1 Plot after filtering each UMI bin for 3 TCR-containing beads or more
text:
13.1 Plot after filtering each UMI bin for 3 TCR-containing beads or more

pct_trb_sum <- pct_trb %>%
  filter(n_trb_with_tcr_beads > 3,
         n_umi != 0) %>%
  mutate(new_n_umi = case_when(n_umi %in% c(5, 6) ~ "5+",
                               T ~ as.character(n_umi))) %>%
  group_by(new_n_umi) %>%
  summarize(sum_n_trb_beads = sum(n_trb_beads),
            sum_n_trb_beads_with_tcr = sum(n_trb_with_tcr_beads),
            mean_pct_trb_with_tcr = mean(pct_trb_with_tcr),
            std = sd(pct_trb_with_tcr),
            serror = std.error(pct_trb_with_tcr))

trb_plot <- ggplot(pct_trb_sum, aes(x = new_n_umi, y = mean_pct_trb_with_tcr)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#5D74A5FF") +
  geom_text(data = pct_trb_sum, 
              aes(x = new_n_umi, 
                  y = 80,
                  angle = 90,
                  label = sum_n_trb_beads),
              colour="black", 
              size=3.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_pct_trb_with_tcr-serror, 
                    ymax=mean_pct_trb_with_tcr+serror), 
                width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9)) +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank()) +
  xlab("Number of constant TCR UMIs on a bead")

16.1 P102TA Puck 10

P102TA_10_TCRA <- P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(str_detect(chains, "TRA")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y)) +
  geom_density_2d_filled(contour_var = "density",
                         adjust = 1/10,
                         show.legend = TRUE) +
  stat_density_2d(contour_var = "density",
                         adjust = 1/2, alpha = 0.2, color = "white") +
  density_fill_8 +
  theme_blank +

  ylim(0,5000) +
